title: Chrome Remote Desktop
subtitle: Remote Screen Interface Config
text: We utilize Chrome Remote Desktop for high-fidelity, secure visual connection. This allows our expert proxy to see your coding editor tab and write code answers in real-time with absolute precision and zero input delay.

items.label: Software Extension
items.desc: Official Chrome remote extension from Google (zero install footprint).

items.label: Stealth Settings
items.desc: Configuring layout resolutions and locking OS notification panels.

items.label: Network Bandwidth
items.desc: Broadband speeds over 25 Mbps recommended to prevent remote lag.

title: Otter.ai Voice Feed
subtitle: Stealth Audio Transcription Engine
text: Otter.ai monitors the interviewer's speech feed and transcribes questions in real-time. The text feed is displayed on your auxiliary screen for the expert, ensuring we match verbal queries immediately.

items.label: Live Transcript
items.desc: Transcribes meeting conversations instantly onto local support displays.

items.label: Audio Cable routing
items.desc: Virtual loops channel audio outputs straight to translation algorithms.

items.label: Prompt Display
items.desc: Secondary monitor outputs prompt answers for immediate reading.

title: Meeting Tool Integration
subtitle: Screen Share Calibration
text: We optimize tab shares on Zoom, Google Meet, or Teams. Our system ensures you share only the specific compiler browser tab or code project window, keeping remote control software invisible.

items.label: Tab-Level Sharing
items.desc: Only share a single window; remote inputs remain completely concealed.

items.label: Stealth Browser skin
items.desc: Hides address bars, bookmarks, and remote indicators in Chrome.

items.label: Audio routing
items.desc: Separates interviewer audio channels from support audio streams.

title: Wired Hardware Setup
subtitle: Stealth Sound Configurations
text: Connecting a physical wired headset is critical to hide communication profiles. We split the audio channels so you can converse naturally with the interviewer while getting discrete prompts through your inner earpiece.

items.label: In-Ear Buds
Flat profile wired earpieces that stay invisible to desktop webcams.
Audio Splitter
Separates meeting feeds from real-time prompt instruction signals.
Camera Alignment
Eye-level calibration to keep focus angles natural during proxy typing.
